message:
feat(ipc): add token-based authentication with scopes and expiry

Implements IPC authentication so that clients must present a valid
token to interact with the server, with per-token scope restrictions
(read/write/all) and optional expiry timestamps.

- config.rs: add IpcAuthToken struct with token, scopes, and
  expires_at_ms fields; add IpcScope enum (Read/Write/All) with
  allows() method for hierarchical permission checking; add tokens
  Vec<IpcAuthToken> field to IpcConfig; add IpcConfig::validate()
  checking for empty tokens and duplicates; wire validation into
  Config::validate()
- ipc.rs: add IpcAuth struct with authorize() method checking token
  presence, validity, expiry, and scope; add IpcAuthError enum with
  descriptive messages; add IpcEnvelope wrapper for token + request
  deserialization; add IpcRequest::required_scope() mapping request
  types to required scopes (UserVar→Write, Ping/Status/PaneState→
  Read); add IpcHandlerContext::with_auth() constructor; add
  run_with_auth() and run_with_registry_and_auth() server methods;
  refactor run() to delegate through run_with_auth()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
